diagnoses.name: Malignant neoplasm of left main bronchus
diagnoses.evidence_span: malignant neoplasms involving both the left main bronchus and right main bronchus

diagnoses.name: Malignant neoplasm of right main bronchus
diagnoses.evidence_span: malignant neoplasms involving both the left main bronchus and right main bronchus

diagnoses.name: Nicotine dependence, cigarettes
diagnoses.evidence_span: long-standing history of cigarette use with nicotine dependence

diagnoses.name: Major depressive disorder, single episode, unspecified
diagnoses.evidence_span: diagnoses of major depressive disorder, single episode unspecified

diagnoses.name: Dependence on supplemental oxygen
diagnoses.evidence_span: oxygen saturation maintained in the low-to-mid 90s on supplemental oxygen

procedures.name: Bronchoscopy with inspection of tracheobronchial tree
procedures.evidence_span: Under direct visualization via bronchoscopy, inspection of the tracheobronchial tree was performed to assess the extent of disease

procedures.name: Diagnostic excision from left main bronchus
procedures.evidence_span: Diagnostic excisions were obtained from both the left main bronchus and right main bronchus to confirm malignancy

procedures.name: Diagnostic excision from right main bronchus
procedures.evidence_span: Diagnostic excisions were obtained from both the left main bronchus and right main bronchus to confirm malignancy

procedures.name: Dilation of left main bronchus with intraluminal device placement
procedures.evidence_span: dilation of the left main bronchus with placement of an intraluminal device to restore airway patency

procedures.name: Destruction of malignant tissue of left main bronchus
procedures.evidence_span: destruction of malignant tissue at this site

procedures.name: Dilation of right main bronchus with intraluminal device placement
procedures.evidence_span: Similar therapeutic measures were applied to the right main bronchus, which also received dilation with intraluminal device placement

procedures.name: Destruction of malignant tissue of right main bronchus
procedures.evidence_span: destruction of diseased tissue via endoscopic approach

procedures.name: Influenza vaccine
procedures.evidence_span: The patient received influenza vaccine during this encounter

medications.name: Morphine SR
medications.evidence_span: Morphine SR 30 mg PO once daily

medications.name: Morphine oral solution
medications.evidence_span: Morphine oral solution 5-10 mg PO/NG q2-3h as needed for breakthrough pain

medications.name: Alprazolam
medications.evidence_span: Alprazolam 2 mg PO/NG daily for anxiety

medications.name: Guaifenesin-dextromethorphan
medications.evidence_span: Guaifenesin-dextromethorphan 10 mL PO/NG q4-6h as needed

medications.name: Albuterol nebulizer solution
medications.evidence_span: Albuterol 0.083% nebulizer solution 1 neb IH q4-6h

medications.name: Miconazole nitrate vaginal cream
medications.evidence_span: Miconazole nitrate 2% vaginal cream as directed
